headline: Disney's live-action Moana bombed. Is old IP not working anymore?
summary: Disney's (DIS) live-action remake of Moana underwhelmed at the box office during its opening weekend, bringing in only $95 million. Yahoo Finance Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferré and AInvest managing editor Adam Shapiro sit down with Morning Brief host to discuss.

content.title: Disney's live-action Moana bombed. Is old IP not working anymore?
content.description:
Disney's (DIS) live-action remake of Moana underwhelmed at the box office during its opening weekend, bringing in only $95 million.

Yahoo Finance Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferré and AInvest managing editor Adam Shapiro sit down with Morning Brief host to discuss.
content.summary: Disney's (DIS) live-action remake of Moana underwhelmed at the box office during its opening weekend, bringing in only $95 million. Yahoo Finance Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferré and AInvest managing editor Adam Shapiro sit down with Morning Brief host to discuss.

headline: A dozen states file lawsuit to block Paramount Skydance-Warner Bros. Discovery merger
summary: State attorneys general from a dozen states including California, New York and Washington filed a lawsuit to block Paramount Skydance's $110 billion takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery.

content.title: A dozen states file lawsuit to block Paramount Skydance-Warner Bros. Discovery merger
content.summary: State attorneys general from a dozen states including California, New York and Washington filed a lawsuit to block Paramount Skydance's $110 billion takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery.

headline: FuboTV shares pop on appointment of former Disney+ executive Alisa Bowen as CEO
summary: FuboTV (NYSE: FUBO) shares climbed about 11% after the company appointed former Disney+ president Alisa Bowen as its new chief executive officer, replacing co-founder David Gandler. The company announced that Bowen assumed the role on July 10, bringing nearly three decades of experience...

headline: California, 11 states suing to block Paramount's $110 billion Warner Bros deal
summary: California and 11 states are suing to block Paramount's $110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery, alleging the deal would lessen competition in film distribution and cable ‌television, harming theaters and TV distributors.  The lawsuit is a serious threat to Paramount CEO David Ellison's bid to transform his ‌company into a major competitor to Netflix and Disney.  "With this lawsuit, California and our sister states are fighting for free and fair markets, not rigged markets," California ​Attorney General Rob Bonta said in a statement, adding it "would lead to higher prices, lower quality, and less content for film and television, harming movie theaters, basic cable distributors, and ultimately, audiences on every sofa and movie theater seat in the U.S.”

content.title: California, 11 states suing to block Paramount's $110 billion Warner Bros deal
content.summary: California and 11 states are suing to block Paramount's $110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery, alleging the deal would lessen competition in film distribution and cable ‌television, harming theaters and TV distributors.  The lawsuit is a serious threat to Paramount CEO David Ellison's bid to transform his ‌company into a major competitor to Netflix and Disney.  "With this lawsuit, California and our sister states are fighting for free and fair markets, not rigged markets," California ​Attorney General Rob Bonta said in a statement, adding it "would lead to higher prices, lower quality, and less content for film and television, harming movie theaters, basic cable distributors, and ultimately, audiences on every sofa and movie theater seat in the U.S.”

headline: Disney initiated at Buy as analyst sees parks, streaming fueling next growth phase
summary: Investing.com -- Benchmark initiated coverage of Walt Disney with a Buy rating and a $115 price target, arguing the entertainment giant is evolving beyond its legacy media roots into a diversified consumer engagement platform powered by its theme parks, streaming services and sports assets.

content.title: Disney initiated at Buy as analyst sees parks, streaming fueling next growth phase

headline: Is Disney or PayPal the Better Rebound Play Now?
summary: Both Disney and PayPal sit well below their multi-year highs, and both are flashing signals that tempt bargain hunters. But for a retirement portfolio, only one of these beaten-down names actually holds up under scrutiny.

content.title: Is Disney or PayPal the Better Rebound Play Now?

headline: California-led states sue to block Paramount’s $110 billion Warner Bros Discovery deal
summary: California and 11 states sued to block Paramount's $110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery, alleging the deal would create a media behemoth with the power to raise prices in film and television.  The lawsuit ‌threatens to derail Paramount CEO David Ellison's bid to transform his company into a major rival of Netflix and Disney.  But the states argued ‌the deal would harm theaters and television distributors, and that harm would trickle down to hurt consumers and workers.

content.title: California-led states sue to block Paramount’s $110 billion Warner Bros Discovery deal
content.summary: California and 11 states sued to block Paramount's $110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery, alleging the deal would create a media behemoth with the power to raise prices in film and television.  The lawsuit ‌threatens to derail Paramount CEO David Ellison's bid to transform his company into a major rival of Netflix and Disney.  But the states argued ‌the deal would harm theaters and television distributors, and that harm would trickle down to hurt consumers and workers.
